questions.question: Explain the difference between FIFO ordering and total ordering in group communication.
expectedPoints: FIFO ordering preserves sending order from each sender
Total ordering ensures identical delivery order across all processes
FIFO is weaker than total ordering

questions.question: Describe the Two-Phase Commit protocol and discuss its advantages and limitations in distributed systems.
expectedPoints: Advantages: Ensures atomicity, simple to understand
Limitations: Blocking problem, single point of failure
